hero.title: A quieter expression of Napa Valley.
hero.body: Crimson & Cardinal brings together Oakville fruit, disciplined cellar work, and a refined Napa Valley profile shaped for collectors, hosts, and those who value a bottle with presence.

metrics.sectionBody: Our production remains intentionally limited so each release can be handled with care from vineyard to bottle.

cards.title: From Oakville, with intention.
cards.body: Oakville sits at the heart of Napa Valley and is known for producing Cabernet Sauvignon with depth, structure, and aging potential. We keep the style measured and composed.

cards.title: Made with patience.
cards.body: Shaped through careful fruit selection, gentle handling, and extended aging in new French oak to protect texture, concentration, and natural character.

cards.title: For the table, not the spotlight.
cards.body: Chosen for private dinners, meaningful gifts, and bottles opened with people who understand the value of keeping things simple and well made.

product.title: Crimson & Cardinal Red Wine
product.subtitle: 2021 Oakville, Napa Valley
product.body: Structured and full-bodied, with dark fruit, subtle spice, and a long oak-framed finish. Built with the depth expected of Napa Valley Cabernet, but finished with restraint and polish.

values.title: Why Crimson & Cardinal?
values.subtitle: The principles that define our winemaking

items.title: Oakville Provenance
items.body: Sourced from the heart of Napa Valley, ensuring exceptional structure and depth.

items.title: Disciplined Craft
items.body: Aged 24 months in French oak with minimal intervention to preserve natural character.

items.title: Limited Allocation
items.body: Deliberately small production volume guarantees meticulous attention to every barrel.

items.title: Quiet Luxury
items.body: Designed for private tables and seasoned collectors, avoiding unnecessary spectacle.

newsletter.title: Stay close to the next release.
newsletter.body: Receive release updates, allocation news, and occasional notes from the cellar.

inquiry.title: Send an Inquiry
inquiry.body: Interested in acquiring Crimson & Cardinal? Leave your details and we will get back to you.

footer.address: Oakville Cross Road, Oakville, CA 94562 USA
